projectDescription: A real-time particle simulation and visualization engine built with React and Three.js for defining complex trajectories through dynamic mathematical formulas.
keyFeatures: Real-time particle physics simulation with custom force equations
Mathematical formula evaluation supporting trigonometry, hyperbolic functions, and operators
3D visualization with particle trails, force vectors, and coordinate axes
Interactive GUI for particle creation, editing, and simulation control
Dual simulation modes: kinematic (massless) and dynamic (mass-based)
Event system with conditional triggers for pause and color changes
Ground collision detection with friction simulation
Configuration import/export for saving and loading scenarios
Velocity Verlet integration for accurate physics calculations
publicApiSurface: evaluarFormula(formula, t, x, y, z) - Dynamic formula evaluation engine
PData interface - Particle data structure with position, velocity, forces, mass, events
Force interface - Force vectors defined by mathematical formulas
ParticleEvent interface - Event system with conditions and actions
Simulation controls - play/pause, reset, gravity toggle, friction adjustment
Visualization modes - particle trails, force arrows (off/resultant/individual), axes, grid
Mathematical functions - sin, cos, tan, sinh, cosh, tanh, sqrt, log, abs, min, max, random
Configuration format - JSON save/load with settings and particle definitions
